release_notes: v1.3.0 — the redesign. A full visual refresh: one design system behind every screen (deep navy chrome, steel-blue accent, hairline-bordered panels), a cleaner navigation rail with a single family of monochrome icons in place of mixed colour emoji, and typography chosen for the job — Barlow Condensed for big KPI numbers and page titles, Inter for body and table text where it reads better at small sizes. KPI cards gain uppercase labels and a movement chip; sections get proper headings over hairline dividers; the competitive heatmap moves to a solid steel ramp so mid-range cells no longer wash out, with your own brand's row highlighted. Charts now match the app instead of rendering in a mismatched default.
